name: Subiekt nexo / InsERT Sfera Bridge
summary: Planned Subiekt nexo connector via a local Sfera/SQL bridge for Polish marketplace ERP pilots.
description: Added because Marketing repeatedly points to marketplace -> ERP synchronization and Subiekt is a likely Polish SMB ERP target. Unlike BaseLinker or enova365 WebAPI, this connector needs validation first: practical integrations often require a local bridge around InsERT Sfera libraries or read-only SQL access, not a simple public SaaS token. The planned connector should therefore start as a local bridge contract, not a direct cloud API promise.
useCases: Read Subiekt stock and compare it with BaseLinker inventory.
Create a draft sales order from a marketplace order after operator approval.
Offer a local-first path for customers whose ERP data cannot leave the organization.
requires: InsERT Sfera or read-only SQL access
